get_youtube_transcript.name: get_youtube_transcript
get_youtube_transcript.description: Extracts the transcript/captions from a YouTube video given its URL or video ID. Returns the full transcript as plain text, with optional timestamps.

video_url.description: YouTube video URL (e.g. https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=abc123) or just the video ID (e.g. abc123)

include_timestamps.description: Whether to include timestamps in the transcript output. Default is false.
